---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---

Notes on structural bioinformatics, machine learning for genomics, and reproducible computational biology.

The blog has an [RSS feed](blog.xml) if you'd rather follow that way.
